title: xylocarpus touloucouna
intro: Xylocarpus touloucouna is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae, commonly known as the Touloucouna tree. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Xylocarpus touloucouna include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
